ab: kuzing ki yaba mu musa matisan ki mama mu su sahaysa.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: kyalun sami niya， magali mabaka’ utux takayu ku ramu’iy sali.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: tamapang saku ramu’iy sali kiya ga, kahun saku ramu’iy masahutaw ti hugan la.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: maras su hi kating ru pinnang ku yaba bay niya mama.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: matisan sami ti abiyan ki mama mu, payux pinyuwan niya su yayuwaw sarali.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: minhari su a’awsa mu ga, sapa’as kung ni mama mu maha babawi su la, ru waya hayuti ku inrakyasan su uziy la.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: maha kung, “naw mu su balay kuzih mama la ga, uwah matisan sali mu su sa’utux.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
